top_signals.title: Dismissal of Ukraine’s defense chief sparks political crisis
top_signals.summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy's reshuffle has fueled public anger over his exclusion of Mykhailo Fedorov, a 35-year-old tech expert.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Esei Haangana set for debut as Japan prepares to face France in hot and humid Tokyo
top_signals.summary: Japan coach Eddie Jones made six changes to the team that started against Ireland in Newcastle, Australia, including a completely different front row.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 39% support imperial succession by sons of adoptees: poll
top_signals.summary: Meanwhile, 26.9% voiced opposition to the proposal, while 33.6% said neither or that they are undecided.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japanese has a word for when your husband makes you sick
top_signals.summary: Explore Japan's "husband-origin illness" while learning vocabulary and grammar about marriage, retirement and relationships.

top_signals.title: Scattered Spider members behind TfL hack get five years in prison
top_signals.summary: Two leading members of the Scattered Spider cybercrime collective were sentenced to five years and six months in prison each for hacking Transport for London (TfL) in 2024. [...]
